name: dMY Technology Group, Inc. III
description: dMY Technology Group, Inc. III was a blank check company formed for the purpose of entering into a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focused on identifying businesses in the consumer technology sector. In 2021, the company completed its business combination with IonQ, Inc., a leader in quantum computing, which subsequently began trading on the NYSE.
